Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The final battle is here at last...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But first, there are two powerful[n]adversaries we have to confront.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}At the south end of the Moonlight Bridge...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I trust you know what is at stake today?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}You claim you hunt the Shadows to prevent the disaster they bring...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Yet, countless lives are lost each day, even without their intervention.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}The ability to use a Persona is not in itself evil... You have no reason to forsake it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}So, why not just admit it? You do not truly wish to eliminate the Dark Hour...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}You are merely deceiving yourselves in the pursuit of self-satisfaction...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I don't think you truly believe that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Refusing to answer is akin to turning your back on the truth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You are foolish children indeed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Erasing the Dark Hour is the same as erasing yourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}How can you not even conceive such a thought? Your imprudence is truly beyond comprehension.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}As I believed, our goals are irreconcilable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}What a buncha fools. I can't stand to look at ya.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Fate shall decide which of us will remain.[n]{f 1 1}
